biological_replicate: Arabidopsis plants were grown under short-day conditions for 4–5 weeks.
technical_replicate: quantitative electrolyte leakage assays over 6–24 hpi.
experimental_design: This produced mutant groups I, II and III.
factor_value: combinations of previously characterised Arabidopsis EDS1 family mutants (pad4, sag101, and pad4 sag101).
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
